{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Wastelanders
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Wastelanders]] have agreed to protect the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
